channel.title: I am starting a new project with frontity
channel.description:
Hi There,
Just I knew about Frontity it looks so promising, I am willing to try it out by re-building my own blog with it
I hope it would be a good experience :slight_smile:

item.title: I am starting a new project with frontity
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hello @aer17013 and welcome to Frontity

Thanks for your kind words and for sharing your plans with us! Please keep us posted with the progress we love to see what you build!

Read full topic
item.source: I am starting a new project with frontity
